subject: Robustness cleaning of in progress cache
commit_message:
Robustness cleaning of in progress cache

- Removed cm handle entry from in progress map while moving from locked
  to advised and de-registration
- Fixed groovy tests

Issue-ID: CPS-1239
Signed-off-by: sourabh_sourabh <sourabh.sourabh@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ic527c7b5d209e0c7788888942e95ce0c2c59f7c6

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Just my thought, what if we remove the cm handle only during reregistration?? (only if it happens otherwise our TTL will anyways remove it from the map after 30mins I guess)

> 
> Just my thought, what if we remove the cm handle only during reregistration?? (only if it happens otherwise our TTL will anyways remove it from the map after 30mins I guess)

it probaly would work but it seems wrong.
But you are right that we only should update the map AFTER we saved the state to the DB
